rulings.Case Title: BETTY WILLIAMS, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR et al VS. DOES 1 THROUGH 75, INCLUSIVE
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 25, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Honeywell International, Inc.'s motion for summary adjudication of plaintiffs' claim for punitive damages: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD HARTUNG VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Andritz Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 25, 2014 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant Andritz Inc.'s motion to dismiss or stay the action on the grounds of forum non conveniens: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD HARTUNG VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Defendant Andritz Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay On Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 25, 2014 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant Tosco Corporation's joinder in Andritz Inc.'s motion to dismiss or stay on grounds of forum non conveniens is off calendar as moot because the underlying motion remained on calendar and will be ruled upon. = (503/TLJ)
